raw.advertiser_name: 実況パワフルプロ野球
raw.message: ビジュアルがアップデートしたeFootball™を楽しもう

hook.summary: Cinematic stadium reveal transitioning to a high-definition close-up of Lionel Messi.
hook.visual_action: The camera pans over a digital stadium with 'Lionel Messi' on the screens before cutting to Messi looking directly into the lens.

scene_flow: Grand stadium opening with digital banners featuring Lionel Messi.
Fast-paced montage alternating between live-action footage of Messi and in-game goal highlights.
Showcase of a special golden Messi statue and team celebrations within the game engine.
Detailed breakdown of the 'Leo Messi Pack' rewards including player cards and training programs.
Final branding screen with download instructions and the 30th-anniversary logo.
on_screen_text: Glent Prop: Leo Messi Golden Statue '24
audience_proxy: Male football fans and gamers who follow Lionel Messi and enjoy realistic sports simulations.
